sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93756" key="*seui/dai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σευίδαι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n93756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">attendants on Dionysus</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀπὸ τοῦ σεύειν</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
